calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-10-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on WED-SEP-10-2008: Howard Newson Chung, counsel for plaintiff Jenny Chu, who is also present; Alexander Merchant, limited scope attorney for defendant Vito Froncillo, who is also present

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 2347 18th Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94116. The SEP-15-2008 Trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Ernst Halperin, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
